title: dendrobium masarangense subsp. theionanthum
intro: Dendrobium masarangense subsp. theionanthum is a rare and unique species of orchid that belongs to the Dendrobium genus. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that is native to the tropical regions of the Philippines and is prized for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to possess antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be used to treat various ailments, although further research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential uses.
